summary: Frontend-only testing of /blog/dishwasher-not-draining page. All 39+ test cases passed across desktop (1920x800) and mobile (390x844) viewports. Page renders correctly with Precision Craft design system.
context_for_next_testing_agent: DishwasherNotDraining blog page fully tested. All components render correctly: Hero with background, breadcrumb (Home→Blog→Dishwasher), category pill, title, subtitle. Quick Diagnosis Banner with 3-column grid (DIY Easy, DIY Moderate, Call a Pro). TOC with 9 anchor links (7 fixes + checklist + FAQ). All 7 fix sections with FIX #N badges (Fix #1-7). DarkBox components with numbered steps: Fix #1 (7 steps), Fix #2 (5 steps), Fix #3 (5 steps), Fix #4 (5 steps), Fix #5 (3 steps). Callout components for Prevention/Pro tip/Note after fixes 1-3. Fix #6 and #7 have 'When to call a pro' styled boxes with navy left border. Mid-article CTA between Fix #4 and Fix #5 with phone and book buttons. Dark checklist with 6 checkmark items. FAQ accordion with 5 items with open/close and chevron rotation. Bottom CTA with call and book buttons. Author box with 'A' avatar and credentials. Sticky sidebar with 3 widgets: Book Repair, Quick Diagnosis (5 symptom rows), Related Articles (4 links). Related Services section with 3 cards. Footer with logo, phone, copyright. Floating BOOK REPAIR button appears on desktop after scroll >300px. Mobile sticky bar with CALL/BOOK ONLINE/TEXT US buttons (hidden on desktop). All 5 phone links use tel:7605435733, all 7 book links use /book?go=1. Design tokens verified: Montserrat font, #0D1B2A dark navy, #FF5722 orange accent, #F8F5F0 cream background. SEO meta tags and 4+ JSON-LD schemas (Article, HowTo, FAQPage, BreadcrumbList) present.
